closureNotes.outcome:
PR 1.2 of Arc 1 (voxel-decision aggregation fix) landed on EB main at c32c7b1 (PR #316). 7 outputs all GREEN. Sequel to PR 1.1 URN reconcile (EB main f81f7b6). T5 voxel_groups gate fully CLEAR per LUHTECH-EB-TIER1-ROS-OVERLAY-STRATEGY-2026-06-07 section 8.T5.

OUT-1 through OUT-3: voxels.routes.ts aggregation reads at 3 sites (lines 881, 942, 1062) migrated to canonical pd.primary_voxel_urn = v.urn join. Path B locked via DEC.

OUT-4: 2 P1 FUs closed clean — FU-EB-VOXELIZER-LEVEL-EXTRACTION-FIX-1 (aggregation portion) + FU-EB-USER-WALK-2026-05-22-VOXEL-WRONG-LEVELS-DECISIONS-ORPHANED-1 (decisions-orphaned portion). resolution.commitSha + prUrl backfilled in S7->S8 hygiene PR #317 (4b16a06) — no PENDING placeholders remaining on T5 blockers. 9 Arc 2 sibling FUs filed open in PR #316 resolution + 5 Type-B execution-discovery FUs filed in PR #317 hygiene.

OUT-5: DEC d-2026-06-08-aggregation-via-primary-voxel-urn-join landed. Path B canonical locked: pm_decisions.primary_voxel_urn = canonical spatial reference (Stage 6 intake per DEC-010); voxel_decision_attachments = curated/typed attachments via MCP. Semantically distinct.

OUT-6: new voxels.routes.aggregation.spec.ts tests added; stage-6-decisions.spec.ts stale URN test removed.

OUT-7: SPEC.md present at .dlp/deliverables/d-2026-06-08-eb-voxel-decision-aggregation-fix/SPEC.md.

Hard Constraint #1 honored: n8n PostgreSQL pipeline at 159.223.203.231 trivially preserved across pure read-path SQL substitution. No migrations, no schema changes, no DB writes.

CI gate qualified per RULE-CI-UNSTABLE-GATES-IDENTICALLY-RED-1 — zero NEW failures. Two pre-existing failures identical to immediately preceding merge #315: (a) E2E Tests Staging Shards 1-4 Playwright JSON report artifact infra issue (17/17 tests passed), (b) validate@20.x web-dashboard @/lib undeclared path alias. Pure read-path SQL substitution has no mechanism to affect either surface. Rule fired correctly to admit the merge — substrate-honest gate handling.
closureNotes.overrideRecord:
One in-execution substrate-correction captured for the audit trail:

1. Dispatch authoring authored from memory not canonical schema (memory #1 named-failure). CLI silently corrected multiple field-name violations in chat-authored Phase 4 + 5 JSON-mutating scripts: snake_case to camelCase conversions, missing required fields, additionalProperties:false violations. EB-chat self-named the gap; discipline correction codified in S7->S8 hygiene dispatch template (schema substrate pre-fetched + embedded as template constraint for self-check). Promotion to canonical-schema-authoring skill tracked via FU-EB-DISPATCH-AUTHORING-SCHEMA-PREFETCH-DISCIPLINE-1 (P2, filed by hygiene PR #317).

Forward observation: PR 1.2 is the 5th substrate-correction in the cumulative arc (alpha -> beta -> gamma -> URN reconcile -> PR 1.2). Pattern persists at the authoring layer — discipline integrates one more layer per cycle. From this arc forward, canonical-schema-authoring skill expanded to include schema substrate-prefetch as canonical pattern.
